coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 7:48 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 110%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 110% for 5:00. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 5:00 at 110%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 110% for 5:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 17 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/5. 110% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/5. You're building something real here. 3 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 110% FTP × 5:00. Seated. 3 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 40% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 50-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 40% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 5:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 48% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 110%. Then 5:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 48% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 48% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 48% done. 110% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 50-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 50-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/5. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% complete. 110% for 5:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 37 minutes of work done. 14 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/5. You've accumulated 15min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 42 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 42 minutes of work done. 9 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 110-110% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 4 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 5:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 110-110% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 92% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 92% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 52 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
